name: Ward United
text: While this card is on the field, the attack dice rolls and modifier of any creatures used as sacrifice are added to the summoned creature they were sacrificed for.

condition.text: A creature is summoned by sacrificing one or more creatures while Ward United is on the field.

effects.actionText: Sacrificed creatures add attack profile to summoned creature
effects.value: Add the attack dice rolls and modifier of sacrificed creatures to the creature summoned with those sacrifices

duration.text: While this field card remains on the field

params.valueText: Add the attack dice rolls and modifier of sacrificed creatures to the creature summoned with those sacrifices

condition.text: A creature is summoned by sacrificing one or more creatures while Ward United is on the field.

duration.text: While this field card remains on the field

effects.notes: Needs summon pipeline support to preserve which creatures were sacrificed and apply their printed attack dice/modifier to the summoned creature.
